mentions.note: Great international bank; financial services diversifier with dividend.
Travel bull market intact; won't be brought down by Anthropic or broader AI disruption concerns.
Weak performance highly unusual given airline/hotel strength; anomaly in otherwise resilient travel cohort.

Online travel with Priceline, OpenTable brands down 22% on AI disruption fears. Trades 17x forward earnings with 17.6% growth; Europe squeeze priced in, confident Q1 guidance. People will vacation when war ends.
War in Iran cutting into world travel demand; company reporting weakness; risk spreads to hotels, resorts, cruise lines, airlines.
